---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, extension, or documentation improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What can't you do today, and why does it matter? Avoid jumping straight to the solution here.

## Proposed change

Describe the change. If it touches the engine, masking, tools, sandbox, data pipeline, or order path, explain how
it preserves the non-negotiable invariants in [`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md#non-negotiable-invariants).

## Extension point (if applicable)

- [ ] Data source adapter
- [ ] Tool
- [ ] Sandbox backend
- [ ] Evaluation metric
- [ ] Broker adapter
- [ ] Frontend (webui)
- [ ] Other

See [Extending TraderHarness](../../docs/extensions.md) for the contract for each of these, and
[Roadmap](../../docs/roadmap.md) for what's already planned or explicitly out of scope.

## Alternatives considered

## Additional context

Links, mockups, or references to related projects/issues.
